advisory_rubric_items.description: The implementation is idiomatic for this Next/Drizzle client and keeps pagination, search, filtering, loading, and delete-state handling maintainable.
advisory_rubric_items.prompt: Score whether the diff cleanly implements the requested customer API pagination and customer-list infinite-scroll behavior without broad rewrites, brittle special cases, or unrelated changes.

original_visible_test_command: npm install && npm test (verify package.json scripts)
